title: Graphic Designer
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Create high-quality visual assets for digital campaigns (social media graphics, EDMs, web banners) and print materials (brochures, flyers, event signage) that align with marketing goals.
  • Support end-to-end design needs with the team to create engaging content for campaigns, event activations, and related initiatives.
  • Brainstorm with the team to translate campaign strategies into creative visual concepts that resonate with our target audience.
  • Use trend intelligence and knowledge of historical and current markets when designing and executing specific classifications.
  • Adapt designs across multiple formats and scales while maintaining visual consistency.
  • Prepare final files for both print production and digital platforms.
  • Assist in the designing and production of marketing collaterals.
  • Manage multiple projects, interpret briefs, and meet deadlines.
  • Ensure all design work aligns with the company's corporate identity and remains consistent across all touchpoints.
  • Maintain, update, and properly archive records of all design-related work.
  • Ability to multitask in a fast-paced environment and manage multiple ongoing projects simultaneously.
  • Handle other duties and ad-hoc projects as assigned.

Requirements:

  • Minimum 1–2 years of relevant working experience
  • Diploma in Graphic Design or equivalent
  • Strong passion for design with creative flair
  • High level of accuracy and attention to detail when finalising designs
  • Proficient in design and photo-editing software such as Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign)
  • Knowledge in video-editing software (i.e., CapCut) is an advantage
  • Able to commence work immediately or within a short notice period

postedCompany.description:
GAIN CITY BEST-ELECTRIC PTE LTD

Looking for a challenging and rewarding career in a fast paced organization? Join Gain City!


Established in 1981, Gain City is one of Singapore‘s leading retail brand carrying a wide range of quality air-conditioners, home appliances, audio visual equipment, digital and IT products. It is a multi-faceted organisation with distinctive track records in retail and wholesales operations, manufacturing, maintenance and repair, commercial, industrial and residential projects, import and export.
 

Gain City the leading home-grown appliances and electronic retail store is also proud to be the recipient of the prestigious Enterprise 50 Award (5 times), Singapore Prestige Brand Award 2011 (Winner, SPBA-Heritage Brand). Gain City has also previously awarded other celebrated award such as the ISO 9001-2000 Certification, Super Brand (2004,2005,2006,2008 & 2009) and Singapore Promising Brand Award (2006).
postedCompany.name: GAIN CITY BEST-ELECTRIC PTE LTD
